notes: 2024 meta-analysis: 30 studies, n=2105 adults ≥60 years; whey alone showed limited effects on handgrip and lean mass; combined with resistance training effects more consistent
2025 systematic review with pairwise meta-analysis in older adults; mixed cardiometabolic outcomes; some insulin resistance concerns at high doses in older adults
2025 MDPI Nutrients review: whey + resistance training enhances MPS 3–5hrs post-exercise via AKT/mTOR signaling; supports leucine threshold and dose-response claims
Examine.com comprehensive overview; covers MPS, satiety, body composition, DIAAS, dose ranges, and forms; regularly updated
